title: NethpotPack
description: This is specially made u for Potion pvper (NETHPOT) beacuse it contains Low fire,small golden apple and much more For more cheak discription
body:
This pack is secially made up for potion pvpers (NETHPOT) beacuse it contains : 

Low fire,Low shield,Sharp edge sword,Custom totem skin,Small totem in hand/POP,Custom goldenapple and enchanted golden apple skin,No eating particles 

                                       
                                      **ENJOY**
